title: eriogonum preclarum
intro: Eriogonum preclarum, also known as Claret Cup, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States. It belongs to the buckwheat family (Polygonaceae) and is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds. The plant's health benefits include wound healing, reducing inflammation and pain, and antimicrobial properties, which can help combat infections and promote overall well-being. Eriogonum preclarum can be prepared into various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health issues.
